detectors.description:
Reentrancy in helix._transfer(address,address,uint256) (helix.sol#659-783):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (helix.sol#723)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (helix.sol#797-809)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (helix.sol#729)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (helix.sol#817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (helix.sol#781)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (helix.sol#943)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (helix.sol#923)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (helix.sol#925)
	helix._rOwned (helix.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- helix._takeTeam(uint256) (helix.sol#937-945)
	- helix._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (helix.sol#897-933)
	- helix.balanceOf(address) (helix.sol#485-489)
	- helix.constructor() (helix.sol#419-449)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (helix.sol#781)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (helix.sol#951)
	helix._rTotal (helix.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- helix._getCurrentSupply() (helix.sol#1093-1103)
	- helix._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (helix.sol#949-955)
	- helix.constructor() (helix.sol#419-449)
	- helix.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (helix.sol#581-603)
detectors.markdown:

		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](helix.sol#L925)

	- [helix.balanceOf(address)](helix.sol#L485-L489)
	- [helix.constructor()](helix.sol#L419-L449)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](helix.sol#L781)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](helix.sol#L951)

	- [helix._getCurrentSupply()](helix.sol#L1093-L1103)
